validation.slugFormat: Only lowercase letters, digits and dashes; must start with a letter or a digit
validation.endBeforeStart: End date can't be before start
validation.urlHttp: Must start with http:// or https://

noOrganization.title: No organization linked
noOrganization.description: Your account isn't linked to any organization with access to this product.
noOrganization.descriptionFor: Your account isn't linked to any organization with access to {{product}}.
noOrganization.hint: Ask your administrator to add you to an organization and try signing in again.

backendUnavailable.title: Service temporarily unavailable
backendUnavailable.description: Our server isn't responding right now. A deploy or short maintenance window is the most likely cause.
backendUnavailable.descriptionWithStatus: Our server isn't responding right now (error {{status}}). A deploy or short maintenance window is the most likely cause.
backendUnavailable.hint: Give it a minute and try again. If it still doesn't work, contact support.

noRoles.title: No access yet
noRoles.description: Your account doesn't have any roles in {{product}}.
noRoles.descriptionFor: Your account doesn't have any roles in {{org}} for {{product}}.
noRoles.hint: Ask your organization administrator to grant you a role and try again.

login.title: Good to see you again
login.subtitle: Sign in with your Orbiter email.

register.title: Create your School account
register.subtitle: Tell us about you and your school — we'll create your organization and activate the School product.
register.organizationIdHint: UUID of the organization to activate School for.
register.organizationSlugHint: school.orbiter.am/o/{{slug}} — lowercase letters, digits and hyphens.
register.slugInvalid: Use lowercase latin letters, digits and hyphens (e.g. my-school).
register.successDesc: We created your organization and sent an invitation to {{email}}. Check your inbox and sign in with the temporary password.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a one-time code to reset it.
forgot.noticeSent: If that email exists, we've sent a code to it.

reset.title: Confirm code
reset.subtitle: Enter the code from the email and pick a new password.
reset.codeHint: Email may take a moment. Check your spam folder.
reset.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase and a digit.
reset.successNotice: Password updated. Sign in with the new password.

newPassword.title: Set a new password
newPassword.subtitle: You need to change the temporary password before continuing.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Use a strong password you don't reuse anywhere else.
changePassword.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current one
changePassword.policy: Password doesn't meet the required policy

hero.subtitle: School, Jira, CRM — sign in once, switch between Orbiter products in a single workspace.

preview.title: Preview mode
preview.subtitle: You're exploring the product with sample data.

chooser.title: What would you like to explore?
chooser.subtitle: Pick an area — the tour will walk you through it.

student.title: Student pages
student.desc: How a student learns: classes, modules, materials and submitting work.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.desc: How a mentor reviews student submissions: inbox, filters and the review panel.

courseEditing.title: Course editing
courseEditing.desc: Creating and editing courses (needs course permissions).

tour.title: Product tour
tour.intro: Walk through the main stages and see how everything fits together.

navigation.title: Navigation menu
navigation.desc: The top menu is your map: jump to your dashboard, classrooms, reviews, courses, calendar and profile from here.

student.title: Where to start
student.desc: Learning starts from the dashboard — open it from the top menu.

profile.title: Opening your profile
profile.desc: Your profile opens from the user menu on the right.

courseEditing.title: Opening courses
courseEditing.desc: Courses open from this menu item.

reviews.title: Opening reviews
reviews.desc: Reviews open from this menu item.

inbox.title: Review inbox
inbox.desc: Every student submission awaiting review is gathered here.

filters.title: Filters & search
filters.desc: Filter by status or classroom and search by student or material.

card.title: A submission
card.desc: Click a submission to open the review panel — see the work, approve it, request changes or leave feedback.

coursesList.title: All courses
coursesList.desc: Every course you manage — filter by language and search.

openEditor.title: Course editor
openEditor.desc: Open a course to edit it.

tabs.title: Course sections
tabs.desc: Switch between modules & materials, settings and enrollments.

addModule.title: Add a module
addModule.desc: A module is a section of the course — add one with this button.

moduleEditor.title: Module & materials
moduleEditor.desc: Edit the module (title, visibility, hard lock) or delete it; its materials are listed below.

addMaterial.title: Add a material
addMaterial.desc: Add a material to the module — a lecture, reading, practice or review.

materialRow.title: A material
materialRow.desc: Click a material to edit it; the ⋯ menu duplicates or deletes it.

settings.title: Course settings
settings.desc: Slug, visibility and deleting the course. A private course isn't visible to students.

matActions.title: Editor actions
matActions.desc: Save, reset, preview and delete the material — top right.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.desc: Your account details, language and theme all live here.

classrooms.title: Your classrooms
classrooms.desc: See the classrooms you're enrolled in, with their courses and mentors. Open one to start learning.

modules.title: Modules & progress
modules.desc: A course is split into modules that unlock in order. Each module shows its status: current, passed or locked.

materials.title: Studying materials
materials.desc: Inside a module are materials — lectures, readings, practice and quizzes. Mark them complete as you go.

sidebar.title: Module side panel
sidebar.desc: Click a module — a side panel opens on the right with everything inside it.

materialLocked.title: Locked materials
materialLocked.desc: Some materials stay locked until you finish the earlier ones.

materialRead.title: Read it right here
materialRead.desc: Open a material to read it without leaving the panel.

submission.title: Submitting work
submission.desc: For materials that need review, attach files or a note and send your work to a mentor. It then goes to review — you'll see the status change: submitted, in review, approved or changes requested.

review.title: Review & feedback
review.desc: Book a live session with a mentor or wait for an async review. The mentor approves your work or returns it with changes.

roadmap.title: Course roadmap
roadmap.desc: Modules are laid out as a path — work through them from top to bottom.

passed.title: Completed modules
passed.desc: Modules you've already passed are marked as completed.

inprogress.title: Module in progress
inprogress.desc: The module you're working on right now is highlighted as current.

locked.title: Locked modules
locked.desc: These modules aren't open yet — they unlock as you progress.

deadline.title: Deadlines
deadline.desc: A module can have a deadline — keep an eye on the due date.

continue.title: Continue learning
continue.desc: This button takes you straight back into your current module.

reader.title: Inside a material
reader.desc: Open a material to study the content, track your progress and move on when you're done.

overdue.title: Overdue deadline
overdue.desc: A module whose deadline has passed is flagged as overdue — submit it as soon as you can.

proceed.title: Move forward
proceed.desc: Use the bar at the bottom to move between materials and finish the current one.

classrooms.title: Your classrooms
classrooms.desc: The groups of students you mentor. Open a classroom to see its members and their progress.

inbox.title: Review inbox
inbox.desc: Every student submission awaiting review is gathered in one place with filters and search.

createCourse.title: Creating a course
createCourse.desc: Click to open the create dialog and fill in the new course: name, slug, description, language and visibility. Without the permission this step is skipped.

courseEditor.title: Editing a course
courseEditor.desc: Open a course to edit its modules and materials.

claim.title: Claiming a submission
claim.desc: Take a submission so colleagues can see it's already being handled by you.

check.title: Reviewing the work
check.desc: Open the student's files and note, and ask clarifying questions when needed.

slots.title: Slots & live review
slots.desc: Open free slots in your calendar — students book live reviews and the sessions appear in your schedule.

decision.title: Decision & feedback
decision.desc: Approve the work or request changes and leave feedback. Review time is tracked automatically.

profile.themeDescription: Pick a theme. System follows your operating system.
profile.tryRefresh: Try refreshing the page in a moment.

integrations.couldntLoadStatus: Couldn't load integration status. Try refreshing.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.description: Connect your Google account so Orbiter can read and write events on your calendar.
googleCalendar.disconnectConfirmBody: Future calendar events will not be synced.

errors.accessDenied: You declined Google access. Try again if it was unintended.
errors.invalidState: Connection link expired. Please try again.
errors.exchangeFailed: Could not complete connection with Google. Please try again.
errors.generic: Failed to connect Google Calendar. Please try again.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.heroDescription: Office hours, 1:1 reviews, lectures, and deadlines — all in one place.
calendar.noSlotsThisDay: No events scheduled on this day.
calendar.selectCalendar: Select a calendar from the sidebar
calendar.noCalendarsDesc: Create your first calendar to start scheduling.
calendar.couldntLoadSlots: Couldn't load slots. Try a different range.
calendar.deleteConfirmBody: All slots in this calendar will be lost. This cannot be undone.

errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

typePicker.title: What kind of calendar?
typePicker.regularDesc: Personal or organization-shared events with custom title, description and color.
typePicker.bookableDesc: Slots students can book to submit a learning material for review. Only one per mentor.

bookable.deleteConfirmBody: All bookings on this calendar will be cancelled. This cannot be undone.
bookable.alreadyExists: You already have a mentor slots calendar — only one is allowed.
bookable.helpText: Bookable calendars host slots that students reserve to submit a learning material for review. The calendar's display name comes from its slot bookings, so name and description are not editable.
bookable.defaultCapacityHint: Maximum students that can book the same slot. New slots inherit this value unless overridden.
bookable.cancellationLeadHoursHint: Students may cancel their own booking only when the slot still starts at least this many hours in the future. Mentors and admins can cancel without restriction.
bookable.slotCapacityHint: Override how many students can book this specific slot.

import.title: Import calendars from Google
import.couldntLoad: Couldn't load Google calendars. Try again.
import.connectBody: To import calendars from Google, first connect your Google account in Settings → Integrations.
import.notLinked: This calendar is not linked to Google.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.notEnrolled: You're not enrolled in any classrooms yet.
classrooms.noneAvailable: You don't have any available classrooms yet.
classrooms.couldntLoad: Couldn't load classrooms. Try again later.
classrooms.notFoundDesc: Classroom "{{slug}}" doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
classrooms.couldntLoadDetail: Couldn't load classroom. Try again later.

classrooms.couldntLoadCourses: Couldn't load courses. Try again later.

settings.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; min 2 chars.
settings.capacityHint: Whole number ≥ 1. Leave blank for no limit.

settings.deleteConfirmBody: You are about to permanently delete {{name}}. All enrollments, mentor assignments and course attachments for this classroom will be wiped. This cannot be undone.

management.removeMentorDesc: {{name}} will lose mentor access to this classroom. Their mentor account stays in the organization — you can re-assign them later.
management.mentorRemovedDesc: {{name}} is no longer assigned to this classroom.
management.detachCourseDesc: {{name}} will be detached from this classroom. Students lose access to its materials, but the course itself stays in the catalog.
management.deleteAnnouncementDesc: {{title}} will be permanently removed from this classroom. This action can't be undone.
management.announcementPostedDesc: "{{title}}" is now visible in this classroom.

studentsPane.couldntLoad: Couldn't load students. Try again later.
studentsPane.removeStudentDesc: {{name}} will lose access to all materials in this classroom. The user account stays in the organization — you can re-enroll them later.
studentsPane.studentRemovedDesc: {{name}} is no longer enrolled in this classroom.

mentorsPane.couldntLoad: Couldn't load mentors. Try again later.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.emptyDesc: Use Announcements to share deadlines, schedule changes, and wins with everyone in this classroom.

composer.title: Title

composer.pinToTopSub: Keeps this announcement above the rest until you unpin it.

ai.startHint: The AI fills in the rest. You can refine before anything is created.

insp.empty: Select a block to edit its tools.

callout.desc: Coloured note box — text edits like a paragraph

matEditor.emptySub: Add blocks to compose lessons, practice and checks. Press / anywhere to insert.

palD.richtext: Rich text — headings, lists, table, code, quote

nav.emptyModule: This module has no materials yet

set.title: Material settings
set.subtitle: Slug, type, duration, access and gating.
set.publicHint: Public materials are visible to enrolled students.
set.focusModeHint: Hide the top navigation while editing (⌘⇧F).

gating.title: Require mentor approval
gating.desc: Students finish this material and send it for review. The next material stays locked until a mentor approves it.

mode.asyncDesc: Mentor reviews submitted work on their own time.
mode.liveDesc: Student books a live slot with a mentor.

opt.allowFilesHint: Students can attach files to their submission.
opt.requireNoteHint: Students must write a note when submitting.
opt.liveBookingWindowHint: How many days ahead students can book a slot (max 30).
opt.inCatalogHint: Discoverable in the public course catalog.
opt.deadlineExtHint: Mentors can extend a student's deadline.

rebuild.title: The material editor is being rebuilt
rebuild.body: We're rebuilding the material editor from scratch for a much smoother editing experience. It will be back here shortly.

blockErrors.title: Some blocks have errors
blockErrors.body_one: Fill in {{count}} required field in the highlighted blocks.
blockErrors.body_other: Fill in {{count}} required fields in the highlighted blocks.

materialEditor.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page and discard them?
materialEditor.invalidSlugDesc: Use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens (min 2 chars).
materialEditor.title: Material title
materialEditor.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description students see in the reader…

blocks.title: Blocks
blocks.empty: No content yet — add your first block to start writing this material.
blocks.toolboxHint: Drag onto the material, or click to add at the end.

media.title: Media
media.empty: No media yet. Upload an image to get started.
media.dragHint: Drag an image onto an image block to use it, or click + to add a new image block.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: As a student will see it
preview.empty: No content yet — add blocks on the left to fill the material.
preview.fileTypes: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images, ZIP — up to 5 MB each
preview.noteHint: Add a note for your mentor…

instr.closingLive: Your mentor will go through it with you on a call.
instr.closingAsync: Your mentor will review it shortly.
instr.filesNoteLive: Attach your work, leave a note, then book a slot with your mentor
instr.filesNoteAsync: Attach your work and leave a note for your mentor
instr.filesLive: Attach your work, then book a slot with your mentor
instr.noteLive: Leave a note about your work, then book a slot with your mentor
instr.noteAsync: Leave a note describing your work
instr.defaultLive: When you're ready, book a slot with your mentor
instr.defaultAsync: When you finish reading, mark this material as submitted

requirementHints.note: Leave a note for your mentor first
requirementHints.files: Attach at least one file first
requirementHints.both: Attach files and leave a note first

deleteBlockConfirm.title: Delete this block?
deleteBlockConfirm.body: This block and its content will be removed. You can press Ctrl+Z to undo.

deleteModal.title: Delete this material?
deleteModal.bodyPrefix: You are about to permanently remove
deleteModal.bodySuffix: and all its blocks. Students enrolled in classrooms that include this material will lose access. This cannot be undone.

publishOnModal.title: Make this material public?
publishOnModal.body: Public materials become visible to every student in classrooms that include this course. Make sure the content and submission settings are final — once published, students may start working on it immediately.

publishOffModal.title: Hide this material from students?
publishOffModal.body: Switching back to private will hide the material from all classrooms. Students who already started working on it will lose access until it's published again.

gating.title: Require mentor approval to unlock next material
gating.desc: When enabled, students complete this material and submit it for review. The next material in the module stays locked until a mentor marks this one as approved.
gating.asyncSub: Mentor reviews the submission on their own time. Fastest to unlock.
gating.liveSub: Student books a slot on the mentor's calendar and defends the work on a call.
gating.liveInfo: Student sees a "Book a slot" step on the material page. The next material unlocks only after the session is marked complete and approved by the mentor.
gating.allowFilesSub: Student can attach files of any type along with the submission.
gating.requireTextSub: Student must leave a written note explaining the submission.

creator.textPlaceholder: Write the paragraph or heading text…
creator.caption: Caption

info.DIVIDER: A horizontal rule will be inserted at the end of the material.
info.QUIZ: An empty quiz block will be added — fill in the question, options and the correct answer in the editor below.
info.TABLE: A 2×2 table will be added — fill in cells, add rows or columns from the editor below.
info.MENTOR_QUESTIONS: An empty mentor questions block will be added — fill in topics, questions and reference answers in the editor below.
info.CHECKLIST: An empty checklist will be added — set the title, item text and marker (check / cross / dash) in the editor below.
info.ICON_GRID: An empty icon grid will be added — set title, column count, icon names (lucide), labels and tones in the editor below.
info.LINK_CARDS: An empty link cards block will be added — fill in title, URL, source and kind for each card in the editor below.
info.BUTTON_ROW: An empty button row will be added — set label, icon, variant and URL for each button in the editor below.
info.VIDEO: An empty video block will be added — paste the YouTube/Vimeo URL or direct file link and set the provider in the editor below.

editors.writeTextPlaceholder: Write the paragraph or heading text…
editors.checklistTitlePlaceholder: Title (optional) — e.g. By the end of this reading, you will be able to:
editors.imageDropHint: Or drag an image from the media library on the left.
editors.noItemsYet: No items yet — add the first one below.

highlight.label: Highlight
highlight.tooltip: Highlight as code (`monospace` pill, survives save)

quiz.addQuestionTitle: Insert a new quiz block right below this one

upload.svgNotAllowed: SVG files aren't allowed — please use PNG / JPG / WebP / GIF.

callout.title: Callout
callout.subtext: Highlighted box with icon (info, warning, tip, …)

checklist.title: Checklist
checklist.subtext: Themed list with CHECK / CROSS / DASH markers

iconGrid.subtext: Grid of cards with Lucide icons

linkCards.title: Link cards
linkCards.subtext: External resources (docs, papers, articles, videos, books)

buttonRow.title: Button row
buttonRow.subtext: Row of CTA buttons (Primary / Outline / Ghost)

types.title: What does your team need to track?
types.subtitle: Each record type is a kind of thing — students, leads, partner companies. Define the fields once; forms on your site write into them.

delete.title: Delete this record type?
delete.body: Deleting "{{name}}" removes the record type and its field definitions. Records of this type may become inaccessible. This can't be undone.

empty.title: Let's set up your first record type.
empty.cardTitle: A record type is a kind of thing you collect.
empty.cardBody: Define its fields once — name, email, phone, whatever you need — and forms on your website will save into them. Records show up in the table view for your team to work with.

typeEditor.errFieldIncomplete: Every field needs a label and a key.
typeEditor.errDupKeys: Two fields share the same key — keys must be unique.

upload.draftFailed: Could not start your listing — check your connection.
upload.deleteFailed: Could not remove the photo — try again.

flag.blockedSummary: AI flagged this photo. Remove it to continue.

ai.title: AI photo review
ai.collapsedSummary: Auto-detection · Quality filter · Privacy protection — tap to learn more
ai.subtitle: As soon as you upload, our AI scans every photo before you move on. You don't need to do anything — this happens in the background.
ai.detect: Detects make, model, year, body type and colour — pre-fills the next steps for you.
ai.quality: Rejects any low-quality photo: too dark or blurry, the car covered in heavy dirt or snow, over-edited or heavily filtered shots, and angles that obviously hide damage.
ai.privacy: Automatically blurs licence plates and people's faces, so your photos stay private.
ai.singleCar: Each photo must show a single car — collages, photo grids and multi-image composites will be rejected.
ai.duplicates: Detects duplicate and near-identical photos — only one of each angle is kept so your gallery stays clean.
ai.watermark: Detects watermarks, dealer logos and other site overlays — a strong signal the photo was lifted from another listing, so it gets rejected.
ai.inappropriate: Rejects 18+ or violent content and anything that isn't a real car (memes, stock images, screenshots).
ai.consent: By uploading you confirm the photos are your own and agree to automated review.

candidates.title: AI suggestions
candidates.subtitle: Our AI matched your photos to these cars. Pick one to pre-fill the fields below — you can edit anything afterwards.
candidates.failed: AI analysis is not ready yet — try again in a moment, or fill in the fields manually.
candidates.none: AI couldn't match a car from your photos — fill in the fields manually.
